trendOverride.reason: No trend override: quality 80/88, trend 58/100, sentiment neutral.

authenticity.notes: Authenticity check needs review: improve specificity, add real examples, strengthen sources, or choose a more distinct market angle.

notes: Content is repetitive and lacks depth in key areas
Missing specific examples or use cases
Lacks clear structure or actionable steps for readers
Does not provide sufficient technical or practical detail for implementation
Some content appears to be duplicated or restated without elaboration
recommendedFixes: Expand on specific implementation steps with examples
Include diagrams or visual aids to support workflow explanation
Add technical details or code samples for practical use
Clarify the business value and impact with metrics or outcomes
Improve content structure and section organization
Add related content on integration with other tools or platforms
Provide before/after scenarios or case studies for context
